hooks.prompt: Evaluate if this session produced results worth logging to the autolab journal. Check: 1) Was an experiment created or iterated? 2) Did metrics improve for any experiment? 3) Were new results logged to results.tsv? If YES: respond with specific UPDATE instructions, e.g. UPDATE lab/journal.md: [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS] EXPERIMENT | name | details. If nothing worth logging: respond with {"decision": "skip"}
